name: Reskilling
note: "Training for promotion or change of position within the company"

name: Upskilling
note: "Training to acquire new skills or knowledge that will improve job performance"

name: Cross-skilling
note: "Training to acquire skills or knowledge in areas other than those of the current position"

name: New-skilling
note: "Training to acquire skills or knowledge in areas that did not exist in the company"
